cmdb_software.query: SELECT name, version, publisher, install_date FROM programs;
cmdb_software.description: Сбор установленного ПО для интеграции с Naumen

cmdb_usb_devices.query: SELECT vendor, model, serial, usb_port FROM usb_devices;

cmdb_network.query: SELECT a.interface, d.mac, a.address as ip_address, a.mask FROM interface_addresses a JOIN interface_details d ON a.interface = d.interface WHERE a.address != '127.0.0.1' AND a.address NOT LIKE '%::%';
